title: Pan-Seared Zhu Fillets with Shui Sauce
description: Delicious pan-seared zhu fillets served with a sweet and savory shui sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the zhu fillets with Chinese five-spice powder, salt, and pepper.
Add fish oil to the pan and swirl it around to coat the bottom.
Add the zhu fillets to the pan and sear for 3-4 minutes on each side.
Remove the zhu fillets from the pan and set them aside to rest.
Add the shui sauce to the pan and stir to combine with the remaining pan juices.
Return the zhu fillets to the pan and simmer in the shui sauce for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve the zhu fillets hot over brown rice, garnished with golden stir-fry vegetables.
Clean up any spills or messes in the kitchen.
